summary: Branch does not implement the template & traceability changes required by spec; missing repair-log and tests not updated.

requirement_checks.requirement: The default factory review templates are updated to the target structure with bold labels in the summary block (PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES), and the top block clearly shows decision, method, summary, findings counts, and artifacts.
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md contains legacy banner '✅ Autonomous review completed with decision **PASS**' and 'Summary: {{REVIEW_SUMMARY}}'.
scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md contains legacy layout with 'Autonomous review decision: REQUEST_CHANGES' and separate artifacts/footer blocks.

requirement_checks.requirement: Both PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES review templates use the same visible section headings and ordering.
evidence: Content mismatch between scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md and scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md (different headings and ordering).

requirement_checks.requirement: The top traceability block renders as a single <details> wrapper with flat subsections (no nested <details> blocks).
evidence: scripts/lib/review-output.mjs::renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown currently emits a separate '<details>' element per requirement group (nested details).

requirement_checks.requirement: Review authoring guidance (.factory/prompts/review.md) omits manual methodology instruction and clarifies traceability is injected automatically.
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md currently includes the line 'Include the methodology used ({{METHODOLOGY_NAME}}).' indicating the reviewer is asked to add methodology in review.md.

requirement_checks.requirement: All acceptance-test-related tests updated to assert the new summary block, flattened traceability, and template layout.
evidence: Search for 'Factory Review' in tests returns no matches; templates still show legacy format so tests were not updated to assert the new summary block.
CI evidence: workflow run id 23614523539: actionlint: success, factory-artifact-guard: success, unit: success — passing CI does not show tests for the new layout updated in this branch.

requirement_checks.requirement: A repair-log (.factory/runs/105/repair-log.md) is provided as an artifact for this run.
evidence: Directory listing for .factory/runs/105 does not include repair-log.md.

findings.title: Templates unchanged — PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES still use legacy layout
findings.details: Both GitHub message templates remain in the previous format (legacy banner, duplicated summary/footer) instead of the new '## Factory Review' summary block with bold 'Summary', 'Findings', and 'Artifacts' lines.
findings.recommendation: Update both templates to the target shared layout, ensure the decision/method line is alone on its own line, add bold 'Summary', 'Findings', and 'Artifacts' summary lines with artifact links, and remove the legacy banner and trailing artifacts footer.

findings.title: Traceability rendering uses nested <details> per group
findings.details: renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown in scripts/lib/review-output.mjs emits a separate '<details>' element for each requirement group rather than a single '<details>' wrapper as required by the spec.
findings.recommendation: Refactor traceability generation to emit a single '<details>' wrapper with a summary '🧭 Traceability' and flat Markdown subsections for requirement groups. Update any helpers that produce nested '<details>' to follow the flattened structure.

findings.title: Review prompt still asks authors to include methodology in review.md
findings.details: .factory/prompts/review.md contains instructions to include the methodology in the authored review.md, which will duplicate the method once the new top-level summary block injects it automatically.
findings.recommendation: Remove the instruction asking reviewers to include the methodology in review.md and update the authoring guidance to state that methodology is injected automatically into the top block.

findings.title: Missing repair-log artifact for run 105
findings.details: The run artifacts in .factory/runs/105 do not include repair-log.md though the plan and templates expect it to be present.
findings.recommendation: Add .factory/runs/105/repair-log.md (can be empty if no repairs were required) or document why it is intentionally omitted.

findings.title: Tests not updated to assert new layout
findings.details: Repository tests do not appear to assert the new 'Factory Review' top summary block and flattened traceability; the plan required rebaselining tests (e.g., tests/github-messages.test.mjs, tests/process-review.test.mjs).
findings.recommendation: Update and rebaseline the relevant unit tests and snapshots to assert the new summary block, artifact links, and single-details traceability wrapper. Re-run unit tests and ensure CI verifies the new layout.

findings.title: Truncation and message length should be validated
findings.details: Removing the legacy artifacts footer and adding a summary block changes body length and truncation anchors. The implementation should verify truncation behavior across branch sizes and ensure the summary remains visible.
findings.recommendation: Add or update tests that simulate long review bodies and ensure the truncation anchor leaves the new top summary visible and that artifact links remain present.
